name: Birdeye Product Overview
heading: __MISSING__
product_overview_description:
Birdeye helps local businesses manage their online reputations, customer experiences, and marketing strategies. It consolidates review monitoring from over 200 sites into one dashboard, streamlining responses and improving client interactions. The platform offers automated review requests, helping businesses gather more positive feedback. It also features tools for tracking customer sentiment, managing listings, and engaging with clients through surveys. Birdeye's analytics provide insights into customer behavior and marketing performance, thus by helping businesses to optimize their strategies and demonstrate value to their clients.

Features

  • Helps build and manage business listings across Google, Facebook, Bing and other major search engine websites 
  • Add images, links, social media posts and more to your business listings 
  • Get precise local listing insights to help boost your search rankings, analyze key rankings, optimize your profile and do more. 
  • Scan your business listings across the web to ensure that you’re 
  • Has an intuitive dashboard that helps view all your listings across multiple search engine websites
  • Manage review generation, monitoring and responding to reviews with ease 
  • Offers intuitive AI capabilities when it comes to review management
  • Comes with an AI-powered social media tool that helps you stay consistent with your social media calendars
  • Helps funnel all your webchat leads into a single inbox to follow up and convert over text, social or email
  • Create AI generated social media posts in minutes 
  • Speeds up your social media process by helping you repurpose your top performing posts and assets 
  • Gives granular insights into social media, what’s working and what’s not and how you can engage your audience better 
  • Customers make use of AI to write SEO friendly descriptions and captions 

Pros 

✅Has a great reputation management system 

✅Easy to use and comes with an intuitive user interface

✅Makes it extremely easy to generate reviews and ask for feedback

✅Comes with whitelabel options for agencies

Cons

❌Steep pricing module 

❌Not suitable for partners and resellers 

❌Doesn’t make use of it’s own tech for listings management

❌Limited options for reseller support 

Pricing

As pointed out earlier, Birdeye offers steep pricing plans for it’s customers. Customers also feel that the price isn’t justified for what it has to offer, since a lot of its competitors are offering affordable pricing options for SMBs and agencies. It is mostly suitable for large companies and enterprise level businesses. 

Source: Google Images, Medium
